title: TEL Minor Delay - Stevens to Caldecott

title_translations.zh-Hans: TEL 小幅延误 - Stevens 至 Caldecott
title_translations.ms: TEL Kelewatan Kecil - Stevens ke Caldecott
title_translations.ta: TEL சிறிய தாமதம் - Stevens முதல் Caldecott வரை

updates.text: 05:53-TEL-Minor delay affecting train station services between Stevens and Caldecott stations (both directions). Commuters can continue to use the train service.
